memory.summary: I notice the afternoon feels a lot more doable now, but the lounge outlets are all taken, so the environment is a bit less convenient than I expected. The friend’s invite also makes the meal part feel more social and less like a chore.
They’re already there and ordered, so I’m the late one now. This feels more like a small coordination slip than a real problem.
I can feel my focus slipping right as the workout window is getting close, so the afternoon is getting less stable. It still seems manageable, just a bit more strained than it did earlier.
I’m noticing things feel steadier overall than earlier, with less sleep pressure and lower stress. The main friction now seems to be minor inconvenience rather than anything actually derailing.
Nothing new has come in, so the situation still feels basically stable. I’m mostly just carrying the same minor delay and a bit of residual strain, not anything that looks serious.
Nothing new has changed, so the situation still feels basically steady. I’m just noticing a bit of lingering strain, but nothing that looks like a real problem yet.
